preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat) && TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // empty') && if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ]; then CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs // empty' | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'gh\s+pr\s+create|git\s+checkout\s+-b|git\s+switch\s+-c'; then /app/gastown/gt tap guard pr-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Gas Town PR workflow guard: use gt done to submit work"}'; fi; fi
